poll.question: Marcus and Jade sit close as night settles. Does Marcus finally voice what's building between them—risking true vulnerability—or does he hold it unspoken, protecting this

options.label: Say what he feels
options.desc: Marcus speaks, trusting Jade enough to be fully seen.

options.label: Keep it unspoken
options.desc: Marcus lets the closeness speak for itself, protecting the new equilibrium.

in_play.label: Talk tonight
in_play.desc: Honesty now, before doubt takes root.
